info.title: Lumi - Insights
info.description: Get account analytics (followers, views, likes, etc.) for connected social accounts

get.summary: Get analytics for a connected account
get.description: Returns platform-specific metrics for a connected social account. Supported platforms: TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook. Get connectionId from GET /api/v1/connections.

200.description: Platform-specific analytics metrics. Structure varies by platform but typically includes followers, views, likes, comments, and engagement metrics.

schema.description: Insights object — fields vary by platform (TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook)
